name: Sourdough Mexican Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2 slices of bacon, fried and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, salt, chili powder, baking soda, and baking powder.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the sourdough starter, milk, beaten egg, cream-style corn, grated Cheddar cheese, chopped green chiles, chopped pimiento, and crumbled bacon.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
4. Fill greased muffin pans about 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
6. Makes 12 muffins.
